channel.title: Meal-Plan on Weekly Meal Plan

item.title: Meal Plan — Week of March 15, 2026
item.description:
This Week’s Meals

Day Meal Active Time
Monday Tofu Veggie Stir-fry with Rice 20 min
Tuesday Sweet Potato and Black Bean Tacos 25 min
Wednesday Gluten-Free Veggie Pasta with Marinara 20 min
Thursday Chickpea and Spinach Curry 25 min
Friday Quinoa Salad with Roasted Vegetables 30 min
Saturday Gluten-Free Veggie Pizza 30 min
Sunday Hearty Lentil and Vegetable Stew 20 min

Recipes

Monday: Tofu Veggie Stir-fry with Rice

Serves: 3
Active: 20 min Total: 30 min
